problem.title: Missing Java Reference
problem.scenario: A telemetry review service receives ordered integer readings from a device window after an upload completes. Analysts use a small edge-window check to compare the first and final values before running deeper diagnostics.
problem.task: Given n readings, return the sum of the first and last reading. If the window contains one reading, return that value once.
problem.description: Given n integers, print the sum of the first and last value.
problem.inputFormat: The first line contains n. The second line contains n space-separated integers.

starterCode.java: public class Main { public static void main(String[] args) { System.out.println(0); } }

referenceSolutions.python:
import sys

tokens = list(map(int, sys.stdin.read().strip().split()))
n = tokens[0]
values = tokens[1:1 + n]
print(values[0] if n == 1 else values[0] + values[-1])

generationMetadata.promptText: This fixture intentionally omits the Java reference.
